questions.reference_script: Good afternoon, and thank you for visiting the Riverton History Museum. Guided tours of the main exhibit begin every hour on the hour and last approximately forty-five minutes. Please note that photography is not permitted in the special collections gallery.

Attention all staff, the building's water supply will be temporarily shut off tomorrow morning from eight to ten for scheduled maintenance. Please fill any containers you may need in advance, and contact the facilities office with questions.

Tired of overpaying for car insurance? At Meridian Insurance, we compare rates from dozens of providers to find you the best possible deal in minutes. Our licensed agents are available every day to answer your questions and help you switch without any hassle. Call now for a free, no-obligation quote.

questions.prompt: Imagine that a health magazine is doing an interview about exercise habits. How often do you exercise, and what type of exercise do you usually do?
Do you prefer exercising alone or with other people? Why?
Some people believe employers should offer on-site gyms to encourage employees to exercise. Do you agree? Give reasons to support your answer.
Hi, I'm calling about the train schedule. What time does the first train to Downtown leave on weekdays, and from which platform?
questions.provided_info:
Northline Rail — Weekday Schedule (Central Station to Downtown)
6:15 AM  Platform 2  Express (25 min)
7:00 AM  Platform 1  Local (40 min)
8:30 AM  Platform 2  Express (25 min)
5:45 PM  Platform 1  Local (40 min)
6:30 PM  Platform 2  Express (25 min)
One-way fare: $6.50 (discounted $4.50 with a monthly pass)
